title: schizoloma hosei
intro: Schizoloma hosei, a type of fern native to New Zealand and Australia, is a species of vascular plant commonly referred to as a schizoid fern. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizoloma hosei include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Schizoloma hosei can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, with the latter often being used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
